mapper.select: SELECT s.selection_id, s.stu_id, s.topic_id, s.select_time, s.status, s.final_score, s.completed_at, stu.stu_name AS stuName, t.title AS topicTitle, te.teacher_name AS teacherName FROM selection s LEFT JOIN student stu ON s.stu_id = stu.stu_id LEFT JOIN topic t ON s.topic_id = t.topic_id LEFT JOIN teacher te ON t.teacher_id = te.teacher_id WHERE s.stu_id = #{stuId}
